# ContactProviderError.enumerationTimeout

**Case**

The extension enumeration timed out.

## Declaration

```swift
case enumerationTimeout
```

## Discussion

This can occur if the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemEnumerator] takes too long to enumerate a batch of content or changes.

## Enumeration errors

- **ContactProviderError.cannotEnumerate**: The extension is unable to enumerate.
